title: How Neurons Talk With Chemicals
script_summary: Exploring the chemical communication between neurons through neurotransmitters at synapses.

segments.voiceover: Ever wondered how neurons send messages? It all starts with electrical spikes.
These spikes trigger the release of chemicals called neurotransmitters.
But how do these neurotransmitters know where to go?
They travel across tiny gaps known as synapses!
This chemical communication is essential for everything from movement to memory.
Curious about the brain? Follow for more insights into neuroscience!
